channel.title: Validations on Ocean Model Validation
channel.description: Recent content in Validations on Ocean Model Validation

item.title: AMM7 — Analysis Overview
item.description:
AMM7 Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the AMM7 area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

  • TPXO9 — 2019–2022

    Constituent Amp err (m) Phase err (°)
    M2 0.120 14.5
    S2 0.037 14.4
    K1 0.023 27.0
    O1 0.014 18.2
    • 2019 · 2020 · 2021 · 2022

Horizontal Surface Validation

No horizontal surface validation has been performed for this area yet.

item.title: ENA4 — Analysis Overview
item.description:
ENA4 Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the ENA4 area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

Tidal Analysis

  • TPXO9 — 2020–2022

    Constituent Amp err (m) Phase err (°)
    M2 0.217 21.5
    S2 0.060 26.0
    K1 0.037 37.5
    O1 0.014 15.6
    • 2020 · 2021 · 2022

Horizontal Surface Validation

  • Adaptive_2 — 2016-2023–2023

item.title: NS — Analysis Overview
item.description:
NS Analysis Overview

This page summarises the analyses available for the NS area, organised by type. Use the table of contents to jump to a specific section.

    Constituent Amp err (m) Phase err (°)
    M2 0.113 22.0
    S2 0.030 32.5
    K1 0.006 54.4
    O1 0.011 19.1
    • 2019 · 2020 · 2021 · 2022

Horizontal Surface Validation

Ranking

item.title: AMM7 - TPXO9 - Tidal Analysis
item.description:
Tidal Analysis - AMM7 - TPXO9

Harmonic analysis of sea surface elevation compared with satellite products and tide gauge observations.

Analysis Summary

Analyzed Constituents: K1, K2, M2, N2, O1, P1, Q1, S2
Analysis Date: 2026-04-11
Satellite Product: FES2014/TPXO9

Plots

Tide Gauge Station Map

GESLA tide gauge station locations

Year 2019

K₁ (lunar-solar diurnal) — amplitude/phase comparison with GESLA tide gauges

item.title: ENA4 - Experiment Adaptive_2
item.description:
ENA4 - Experiment Adaptive_2

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: ENA4 Experiment: Adaptive_2 Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: PSAL, SALT, SSS, TEMP_CTD, PSAL_ARGO, TEMP, TEMP_ARGO, PSAL_CTD, SST, TEMP_SURFACE, SALT_SURFACE, TEMP_CTD, PSAL_CTD, TEMP_BOTTOM, SALT_BOTTOM, PSAL_ARGO, TEMP_ARGO Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric PSAL / ARGO floats SALT / WOA SSS / CCI-SSS TEMP_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles PSAL_ARGO / ARGO floats TEMP / ARGO floats TEMP_ARGO / ARGO floats PSAL_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles SST / CCI-SST SST / OSTIA-online
RMSE 2.6881 0.8617 0.9532 2.3349 2.6881 1.6738 1.6738 11.5954 1.4097 126.5669
Bias 0.4124 -0.0851 0.2551 -0.1384 0.4124 -0.0289 -0.0289 5.6587 -0.1611 -49.7789
Corr 0.0345 0.2867 0.6085 0.8955 0.0345 0.9344 0.9344 -0.0595 0.9543 -0.0047
N points 404,643 24,211,200 2,249,860 15,808 404,643 404,567 404,567 12,839 2,289,635 2,292,200

Annual Statistics Trends

Salinity (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

item.title: ENA8 - Experiment Baseline
item.description:
ENA8 - Experiment Baseline

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: ENA8 Experiment: Baseline Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT, SSS, TEMP, SST, SALT_SURFACE, TEMP_CTD, PSAL_CTD, SALT_BOTTOM Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric SALT / WOA SSS / CCI-SSS TEMP / WOA SST / CCI-SST SST / OSTIA-online SALT_SURFACE / CCI-SSS TEMP_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles PSAL_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity
RMSE 0.9011 0.9593 3.8068 1.2381 127.9587 0.9596 1.7252 0.4301 0.7300
Bias -0.1562 0.1783 0.6060 -0.1462 -51.1293 0.1781 -1.0733 -0.0251 -0.0132
Corr 0.2708 0.6262 0.6834 0.9661 -0.0028 0.6260 0.9565 0.7354 0.8645
N points 95,635,200 8,939,945 95,635,200 9,045,039 9,066,600 8,943,595 269,464 249,892 55,464

Annual Statistics Trends

Salinity (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)

item.title: NS - Experiment Adaptive_1
item.description:
NS - Experiment Adaptive_1

Horizontal Validation results comparing model output against observations.

Experiment Information

Area: NS Experiment: Adaptive_1 Validation Type: Horizontal Validation Variables: SALT, SSS, TEMP, SST, TEMP_SURFACE, SALT_SURFACE, TEMP_CTD, PSAL_CTD, TEMP_BOTTOM, SALT_BOTTOM Period: 2016–2023

Overview

Metric SALT / WOA SSS / CCI-SSS TEMP / WOA SST / CCI-SST SST / OSTIA-online TEMP_SURFACE / OSTIA TEMP_SURFACE / CCI-SST SALT_SURFACE / CCI-SSS TEMP_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles PSAL_CTD / ICES cruise CTD profiles TEMP_BOTTOM / NWS-bottomT SALT_BOTTOM / NWS-salinity
RMSE 2.1748 1.9663 2.8422 1.0278 264.0980 1.0238 1.0278 1.9663 1.3349 1.9973 1.3715 0.7038
Bias -0.9116 0.2989 1.0724 0.1374 -254.4987 0.0755 0.1374 0.2989 -0.7386 -0.6306 -0.5514 -0.3967
Corr 0.7571 0.8258 0.7321 0.8820 -0.2998 0.8685 0.8820 0.8258 0.9196 0.4578 0.9200 0.8617
N points 22,782,720 2,064,075 22,782,720 2,150,185 2,133,425 1,998,375 2,150,185 2,064,075 469 524 58,068 58,068

Annual Statistics Trends

Salinity (surface) — annual statistics timeseries (RMSE, bias, correlation)
